title: pelma gyaloglossum
intro: Pelma gyaloglossum, also known as the 'tongue lichen', is a type of rare and endangered lichen that grows in the high-altitude regions of the Himalayas. This lichen has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antifungal, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of pelma gyaloglossum include its ability to treat various ailments such as skin infections, respiratory issues, and digestive problems, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, pelma gyaloglossum is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also dried and powdered for use in traditional medicine.
